# MicroPython embed port as an ESP-IDF component. Sources under py/ extmod/
# shared/ port/ are generated by tools/gen-micropython.sh (gitignored); this
# file + mpconfigport.h are committed. Only built when a board selects the
# Python VM (CONFIG_BR_HAS_PYVM) — other boards register an empty library so
# the absent generated tree isn't an error.
if(NOT CONFIG_BR_HAS_PYVM)
    idf_component_register()
    return()
endif()

# Generate the vendored sources if absent (gitignored; issue #47). Done at
# configure time so the GLOB below always sees them — robust to the build
# driver (idf.py or PlatformIO's `pio run`), no pre-build hook to mis-order.
if(NOT EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/py)
    get_filename_component(_repo_root ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../.. ABSOLUTE)
    message(STATUS "micropython_embed: generating vendored sources")
    execute_process(
        COMMAND bash ${_repo_root}/tools/gen-micropython.sh
        RESULT_VARIABLE _mpy_rc)
    if(NOT _mpy_rc EQUAL 0)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "gen-micropython.sh failed (rc=${_mpy_rc})")
    endif()
endif()

file(GLOB_RECURSE MP_SRCS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/py/*.c
                          ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/extmod/*.c
                          ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/shared/*.c)
file(GLOB PORT_SRCS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/port/*.c)
# Drop the stock printf stdout hook — pyvm.c redirects output to the BLE stream.
list(FILTER PORT_SRCS EXCLUDE REGEX "mphalport\\.c$")

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${MP_SRCS} ${PORT_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS "."
)

# Vendored third-party C — don't subject it to the project's warning policy.
target_compile_options(${COMPONENT_LIB} PRIVATE -w)
# NDEBUG drops MicroPython's own __assert_func (embed_util.c) — newlib already
# provides it, and it turns the VM's internal asserts off for release, which is
# what we want on the robot.
target_compile_definitions(${COMPONENT_LIB} PRIVATE NDEBUG)
